zh.lifeSummary: 當Fernan Perez de Barroso於1253年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多時，他的父親Pedro Gomez de Barroso27歲，母親Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo23歲。他和Mencia García de Sotomayor至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1311年10月8日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩拉曼卡享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Fernan Perez de Barroso于1253年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多时，他的父亲Pedro Gomez de Barroso27岁，母亲Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo23岁。他和Mencia García de Sotomayor至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1311年10月8日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩拉曼卡享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barroso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jorge, Manuel, Jesus, Mario, Fernando, Francisco, Angel, Carlos, Jose Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Margarida, Paulo.
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in an area of clay or loamy soil, from barroso ‘clayey, loamy’ (from barro ‘loam’).

variants.name: Barrozo
meanings: Galician and Portuguese: variant of   Barroso  .

nameMeanings.name: Fernan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

variants.name: Fernán
meanings: A modern form of the old Spanish name Ferdinando, which is of Germanic (Visigothic) origin, from farð ‘journey’ (or possibly an altered form of frið ‘peace’) + nand ‘ready, prepared’. The name was hereditary in the royal families of Spain from an early date. It was borne by Ferdinand I ( d. 1065 ) of Castile and Leon, who conducted successful campaigns against the Moors, and by his descendant Ferdinand V ( 1452–1516 ), who finally expelled the Moors from Spain altogether; he also gave financial backing to Columbus. Through the marriage in 1496 of his daughter Joan the Mad of Castile to the Habsburg Archduke Philip , the name Ferdinand also became hereditary in the Austrian imperial family. Their younger son, Ferdinand ( 1503–64 ), acquired the succession to the kingdoms of Hungary and Bohemia by marriage in 1521 , and became Holy Roman Emperor in 1558 . See Ferdinand .

en.lifeSummary: When Fernan Perez de Barroso was born in 1253, in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain, his father, Pedro Gomez de Barroso, was 27 and his mother, Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo, was 23. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Mencia García de Sotomayor. He died on 8 October 1311, in Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Fernan Perez de Barroso est né en 1253, à Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne, son père, Pedro Gomez de Barroso, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Mencia García de Sotomayor. Il est décédé le 8 octobre 1311, à Salamanca, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Fernan Perez de Barroso 1253 in Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pedro Gomez de Barroso 27 und seine Mutter Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo 23. Er hatte mit Mencia García de Sotomayor mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Oktober 1311 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Fernan Perez de Barroso è nato il nel 1253 nel Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna, il suo padre, Pedro Gomez de Barroso, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Mencia García de Sotomayor. Morì il 8 ottobre 1311, nel Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Fernan Perez de Barrosoが1253年にスペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレドで生まれた時，父Pedro Gomez de Barrosoは27歳，母Chamoa Fernández de Acevedoは23歳であった。彼はMencia García de Sotomayorとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1311年10月8日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンサラマンカで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Fernan Perez de Barroso(이)가 1253년 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 톨도에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pedro Gomez de Barroso(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Mencia García de Sotomayor(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 10월 8일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 살램아카에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Fernan Perez de Barroso nasceu em 1253, em Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha, seu pai, Pedro Gomez de Barroso, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Mencia García de Sotomayor. Ele faleceu em 8 de outubro de 1311, em Salamanca, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Fernan Perez de Barroso родился в 1253 г. в местности толедо, кастилла-ла манча, Испания, его отцу по имени Pedro Gomez de Barroso было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo, 23. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Mencia García de Sotomayor. Он умер 8 октября 1311 г. в местности салэманка, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Fernan Perez de Barroso nació en 1253, en Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España, su papá, Pedro Gomez de Barroso, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Mencia García de Sotomayor. Murió el 8 de octubre de 1311, en Salamanca, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 58 años.
